description: ripgrep (rg) recursively searches the current directory for lines matching a regex pattern.

common_option.name: --after-context
tip: Show NUM lines after each match.

common_option.name: --before-context
tip: Show NUM lines before each match.

common_option.name: --byte-offset
tip: Print the byte offset before each line.

common_option.name: --color
tip: When to use colors (auto, never, always, ansi).

common_option.name: --context
tip: Show NUM lines before and after each match.

common_option.name: --context-separator
tip: String used to separate non-contiguous context lines.

common_option.name: --count
tip: Show the number of matching lines per file.

common_option.name: --count-matches
tip: Show the number of individual matches per file.

common_option.name: --crlf
tip: Treat CRLF as a line terminator.

common_option.name: --dfa-size-limit
tip: The upper size limit of the regex DFA.

common_option.name: --encoding
tip: Specify the text encoding to use.

common_option.name: --engine
tip: Specify which regular expression engine to use.

common_option.name: --exact-depth
tip: Only show results at the exact given depth.

common_option.name: --files
tip: Print each file that would be searched.

common_option.name: --files-with-matches
tip: Print only the paths with at least one match.

common_option.name: --files-without-match
tip: Print the paths that contain zero matches.

common_option.name: --fixed-strings
tip: Treat all patterns as literals instead of regular expressions.

common_option.name: --follow
tip: Follow symbolic links while traversing directories.

common_option.name: --generate
tip: Generate shell completion scripts (bash, zsh, fish, powershell).

common_option.name: --glob
tip: Include or exclude files and directories matching the glob.

common_option.name: --glob-case-insensitive
tip: Process all glob patterns case insensitively.

common_option.name: --heading
tip: Print file path above clusters of matches.

common_option.name: --iglob
tip: Include or exclude files with a case-insensitive glob.

common_option.name: --ignore-file
tip: Specify a path to an ignore file.

common_option.name: --include-zero
tip: Print match count even if zero.

common_option.name: --invert-match
tip: Invert matching. Print lines that don't match.

common_option.name: --json
tip: Enable printing results in JSON Lines format.

common_option.name: --line-regexp
tip: Only show matches surrounded by line boundaries.

common_option.name: --max-columns
tip: Omit lines longer than this limit.

common_option.name: --max-columns-preview
tip: Print a preview for lines exceeding max columns.

common_option.name: --max-depth
tip: Limit the depth of directory traversal.

common_option.name: --max-filesize
tip: Ignore files larger than NUM in size.

common_option.name: --min-depth
tip: Only show results starting at the given depth.

common_option.name: --mmap
tip: Search using memory maps when possible.

common_option.name: --multiline-dotall
tip: Enable dot all mode in multiline searching.

common_option.name: --no-heading
tip: Do not group matches by file.

common_option.name: --no-ignore
tip: Do not respect ignore files (.gitignore, .ignore, etc.).

common_option.name: --no-ignore-global
tip: Do not respect global ignore files.

common_option.name: --no-ignore-messages
tip: Suppress error messages about parsing ignore files.

common_option.name: --no-ignore-parent
tip: Do not respect ignore files in parent directories.

common_option.name: --no-ignore-vcs
tip: Do not respect source control ignore files.

common_option.name: --no-messages
tip: Suppress error messages about failed file operations.

common_option.name: --no-require-git
tip: Respect gitignore files even without a git repository.

common_option.name: --no-unicode
tip: Disable Unicode mode for all patterns.

common_option.name: --null
tip: Follow file paths with a NUL byte.

common_option.name: --null-data
tip: Use NUL as a line terminator instead of newline.

common_option.name: --one-file-system
tip: Do not cross file system boundaries.

common_option.name: --only-matching
tip: Print only the matched parts of a line.

common_option.name: --passthru
tip: Print both matching and non-matching lines.

common_option.name: --path-separator
tip: Set the path separator for printing file paths.

common_option.name: --pcre2-version
tip: Print the version of PCRE2 in use.

common_option.name: --pre
tip: Search the output of COMMAND instead of file contents.

common_option.name: --pre-glob
tip: Only apply --pre to files matching the glob.

common_option.name: --quiet
tip: Do not print anything to stdout.

common_option.name: --regex-size-limit
tip: The size limit of the compiled regex.

common_option.name: --replace
tip: Replace every match with the given text.

common_option.name: --search-zip
tip: Search in compressed files (gzip, bzip2, xz, etc.).

common_option.name: --smart-case
tip: Case insensitively if the pattern is all lowercase.

common_option.name: --sort
tip: Sort results in ascending order (none, path, modified, accessed, created).

common_option.name: --stats
tip: Print aggregate statistics about the search.

common_option.name: --stop-on-nonmatch
tip: Stop reading a file once a non-matching line is encountered.

common_option.name: --text
tip: Search binary files as if they were text.

common_option.name: --threads
tip: Set the approximate number of threads to use.

common_option.name: --trim
tip: Remove ASCII whitespace at the beginning of each line.

common_option.name: --type
tip: Filter by file type (e.g., py, js, html).

common_option.name: --type-add
tip: Add a new glob for a particular file type.

common_option.name: --type-list
tip: Show all supported file types and their corresponding globs.

common_option.name: --type-not
tip: Do not search files matching TYPE.

common_option.name: --unrestricted
tip: Reduce the level of smart filtering. Repeat up to 3 times.

common_option.name: --vimgrep
tip: Print results with match on its own line, including line and column numbers.

common_option.name: --with-filename
tip: Print the file path for each matching line.

common_option.name: --word-regexp
tip: Only show matches surrounded by word boundaries.

common_option.name: -e
tip: A pattern to search for. Can be provided multiple times.

common_option.name: -f
tip: Search for patterns from the given file, one per line.

common_option.name: -m
tip: Limit the number of matching lines per file.
